falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 Index rises by 5% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the pattern's implication of a market bottom, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 70 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would indicate heightened market stress, refuting the current pattern's stability and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: An unexpected aggressive rate cut would signal a dramatic policy shift, directly contradicting the HOLD signal and invalidating the current verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
